evidence_quote: From the Home page: "Consulting and advisory services for pharmaceutical, advanced therapy medicinal products, biologics and medical device industries." Core services listed are Project Delivery, Commissioning Qualification & Validation (CQV), and Quality Risk Management (QRM).
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (validation/QRM consultancy, no antibody program or manufacturing)

evidence_quote: From the Home page: "Agile, Integrated Solutions Manufacturing, Packaging & Distribution" with CDMO services in Clinical Manufacturing, Commercial Manufacturing, Packaging & Labeling, and Clinical Storage & Logistics; resources emphasize "Dry Powder Inhaler Manufacturing."
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (drug-product manufacturing, packaging, and clinical trial supply CDMO; no antibody program or bioprocessing)

evidence_quote: From the Solutions page: services are Preformulation, Formulation Development, and "Dosage Form Development - Serán specializes in developing versatile solid dosage forms, including capsule[s]"; Home page describes a "science-driven CDMO" for "formulation and dosage form technologies." Oral/solid drug-product formulation focus; no antibody work.
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (small-molecule / solid-dosage drug-product formulation CDMO; no antibody program)

evidence_quote: From the Home page: "World's largest Producer of Paclitaxel and Docetaxel" via "Plant Cell Fermentation (PCF®) Technology" for "naturally derived compounds" and "phytochemicals at commercial scale."
disqualifier_reason: small-molecule developer (plant-cell-fermentation small-molecule/natural-product API producer; no antibody program)

evidence_quote: From the Home page: "Singota Solutions is a contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO)... Specializing in Aseptic Filling, Development and Testing, Labeling and Kitting, and Supply Chain Management"; uses "the gloveless, robotic SA25 Aseptic Filling system."
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (aseptic fill-finish + clinical supply CDMO; drug-product fill only, no antibody bioprocessing or program)

evidence_quote: From the Home page: "Renaissance develops and manufactures nasal spray and sterile injectable products"; "a global, pure-play contract development and manufacturing organization ('CDMO') leader with an unparalleled bench-to-shelf service offering for nasal and sterile injectable dosage forms."
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (nasal spray + sterile injectable drug-product CDMO; no antibody program or bioprocessing)

evidence_quote: From the What We Do page: "As your trusted drug product CDMO... aseptic fill-finish manufacturing and lyophilization"; services include "Biologics & Novel Modalities - Drug product development & manufacturing for biologics and other novel modalities" and "Any Molecule, Every Stage." Generic drug-product fill/finish for biologics; no antibody-specific modality, drug substance, or bioprocessing disclosed.
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (parenteral drug-product fill-finish CDMO; 'biologics' is a generic drug-product category, not an antibody program or antibody bioprocessing service)

evidence_quote: From the Contract Manufacturing page: "Afton Scientific offers end-to-end solutions for sterile injectable manufacturing" with "Sterile filling for biologics and small molecules" from its "Charlottesville, VA facility." Aseptic fill-finish only; no antibody-specific modality, drug substance, or bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: distributor or pure CRO with no antibody bioprocessing (aseptic sterile-injectable fill-finish CDMO; 'biologics' refers to drug-product filling, not an antibody program or antibody bioprocessing)
